description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with rolled up arm holes, ribbed collar with in-seam, with a lee badge appliqued onto the inner neck, graphic print with metallic embellishments on the front and stitch detailing along the sidesFittingComfortWash care Hand wash cold Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Perfect for those weekend revelleries, this white t-shirt captures the mood of those shacks of fun. While the metallic embellishments enhances the dark mood, the stitch detailing adds to it a funky touch. Team this T-shirt with jeans or shorts and sports shoes for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
